image_prompt: A striking, high-contrast image. On the left side, a person (only upper torso visible, gender-neutral, perhaps with a stylish, minimalist outfit) is depicted entirely in desaturated black and white, looking groggy and uninspired, holding an empty, dull mug. The environment around them is also monochromatic and slightly blurry, conveying a sense of dullness. On the right side, a vibrant, steaming cup of freshly brewed coffee, rich in warm browns and creams, is being presented. As the coffee enters the frame, a wave of vivid color (like a watercolor splash) emanates from it, gradually bringing the person and their surroundings on the right into full, brilliant color, showing them looking alert and smiling. The Portuguese sentence "Sem café, a vida é em preto e branco." is elegantly written across the dividing line between the black and white and colored sections, changing from monochrome to color as it crosses. Cinematic lighting.
short_sentence: Sem café, a vida é em preto e branco.
caption: Quem mais sente que o dia só começa DE VERDADE depois do primeiro gole de café? ☕ É a nossa dose diária de cor e energia! Qual o seu ritual matinal? Compartilha aqui! 👇 #CafeNaVeia #ManhaColorida #ObvioENecessario #AmantesDeCafe #Despertar
